headline: Vistra Corp. (VST) – Among the 10 Best Robinhood Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires
summary: Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) is included among the 10 Best Robinhood Stocks to Buy According to Billionaires. On May 7, Reuters reported that Vistra Corp. (NYSE:VST) swung to a quarterly profit as rising power demand and higher electricity prices lifted results. The company’s shares climbed 4.2% in premarket trading following the report. Power companies across the […]

headline: Vistra Expands Gas Capacity And Data Center Ties With AI Power Deals
summary: Vistra (NYSE:VST) is pursuing the acquisition of Cogentrix Energy's 5.5 GW natural gas portfolio, adding a large set of gas fired generation assets to its platform. The company has also entered new long term power agreements with hyperscale data center partners to supply electricity to major technology customers. Together, these moves link Vistra more closely to the growing power needs of AI infrastructure and large scale data centers. For you as an investor, this combination of a large gas...
